description_long: This is a classic wristwatch featuring a round, gold-toned case with a smooth, polished bezel and a minimalist dial. The dial is uncluttered, with slender hour and minute hands and subtle hour markers, exuding an elegant and timeless aesthetic. The strap is black, likely made of leather, and is attached to the case with gold lugs, complementing the overall refined look. The buckle is also gold-toned, matching the case and adding a cohesive touch to the design. The watch is slim and lightweight, making it suitable for everyday wear in urban environments. No visible brand logo or decorative embellishments are present, emphasizing its understated sophistication.
description: A slim, gold-toned wristwatch with a minimalist dial and a black leather strap, exuding classic elegance. The design is simple, with a polished case and subtle hour markers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round gold case, minimalist dial, and black strap extending away from the viewer.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the slimness of the gold case and the full length of the black strap laid flat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the gold case and the black strap with the gold buckle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the slim case and strap, with the buckle end of the strap on the left.
attribute_dial_design: Minimalist dial with slender hour and minute hands, subtle hour markers, and no numerals or subdials. The design is clean and uncluttered, with a smooth, polished finish.
attribute_strap_type: Black leather strap with a smooth finish and gold-toned buckle.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with two hands (hour and minute), no complications or special features.
